examples: The visitors are touched by the grandness of the monument.
It has a sense of grandness, but it is not too big or too small.
I sit in a seat where I can see your magnificence and your grandness.
In fact they so overwhelmed by its grandness that they stop being rational in their analysis.
Cathedral House Hotel brings some of the grandness of a Scottish baronial mansion to central Glasgow, with pointy turrets, steep spiral stairs and four-poster beds.
